name: duet
description: Run the duet two-agent CLI harness from Codex as a reusable skill.

interface.shortDescription: Run two-agent duet loops from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use the installed duet CLI to run Claude, Codex, or Gemini in an alternating two-agent loop with session persistence, optional worktree isolation, transcripts, status checks, and LGTM convergence.
defaultPrompt: Use Duet to run Claude review through a two-agent loop.
Use Duet to hand failing test output to a reviewer/coder pair.
